name: CalendarPeriods
description: Preset date-range picker with a sidebar of quick-pick periods alongside two consecutive month calendars for custom range selection.

props.name: onPeriodChange
props.type: (value: string, start?: Date, end?: Date) => void
props.description: Called when a period is selected

props.name: onRangeChange
props.type: (start: Date | null, end: Date | null) => void
props.description: Called when date range changes via calendar click

props.name: weekStartsOn
props.description: First day of week: 0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday

states.rationale: Container has no interactive states. All interactivity delegated to CalendarDay (overlay) and ListItem (overlay) children.

keyboard.Tab: Move focus between ListItem rows and CalendarDay buttons

propertyMapping.note: Figma boolean toggle. React uses ReactNode: truthy renders footer, falsy hides it.

useWhen: Predefined date ranges alongside custom selection
Analytics dashboards with common time filters
Reports with Last N days / All time options
doNotUseFor: Date range without presets — use CalendarRange
Date text input only — use DateInput or DateRangeInput

knownDeviations.description: No L4 color tokens for calendar-periods in tokens.json. Uses semantic and intent tokens directly. Only radius tokens exist as L4.
Figma footer includes time picker (hour/minute dropdowns + AM/PM tabs) not implemented in CalendarPeriods. The code footer is a simple ReactNode slot.
